/CAL: TO SET 1369PC TRIAL/X: PATRICK GUILLORY ALSO APPEARS AS A SPECIAL REPRESENTATIVE FOR THE DEFENDANT,/X: SHIRLEY BEQUE OF THE NATIVE AMERICAN HEALTH CENTER ALSO APPEARS,/X: THE PARTIES WILL NOW STIPULATE TO THE REPORTS,/X: DR MYERS REPORT DATED 06-08-09 AND DR KORPI'S REPORT DATED 06-18-09 COME INTO EVIDENCE,/X: BASED ON THE EVIDENCE, THE COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANTIS COMPETENT TO STAND TRIAL AT THIS TIME,/CRIM REIN/X: THE DEFENDANT PERSONALLY WAIVES TIME AS TO THE 60 DAY RULE,/CONTD: CASE DISPOSITION/
